title: pasania leucocarpa
intro: Pasania leucocarpa, also known as the white trunk pasania, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pasania leucocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Pasania leucocarpa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies in some parts of Asia.
